 So there's a prodigy that everyone in SF knows about but not really anywhere else He's turned 200 million dollars into 20 billion Crazy when in 2024 he released his investment thesis. It's a little situational awareness if you want to go read it It's very interesting till they are he bets on AI and cycles you have chips You have energy you have protons there are total of five cycles So now when everyone is investing in Nvidia He's already moved onto the next cycle and start investing in blue energy or other things that AI needs to survive and continue growing Whenever you see a big run up in sand disk or in micron just know that Leopold was already there I've been investing based on this thesis and my portfolio is doing excellent actually So I do highly recommend that you go read it and try to understand where the future of AI is going
